jobs.title: City Operations Manager - (Michigan)
jobs.content: <p><strong>City Operations Manager</strong></p><p>Bird is the shared-electric-scooter micromobility / dockless-vehicle-rental platform pioneered around the consumer-fleet-rental data model.</p>

jobs.title: Vehicle Mechanic - Bronx, NY
jobs.content: <p>Lead Bird's Vehicle Mechanic function across the Bronx, NY field operations & fleet-management infrastructure.</p>
